_comment: Example ~/.eigen/hooks.json (or ./.eigen/hooks.json). Each hook runs a program on an event; eigen writes a small JSON payload to the program's stdin. Hooks are fire-and-forget and best-effort. Events: session_start, session_stop, session_resume, tool_start, tool_result, turn_done, note.

hooks._comment: Reflect into project memory when a session ends (memory-as-a-hook).
Log every tool call to a file.
